006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with

010 *

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.html;
018
019import java.io.*;
020import java.util.function.*;
021
022import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
023import org.apache.juneau.commons.svl.*;
024import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
025
026/**
027 * Context object that lives for the duration of a single serialization of {@link HtmlSerializer} and its subclasses.
028 *
029 * <p>
030 * See {@link Serializer} for details.
031 *
032 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
033 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe and is typically discarded after one use.
034 * </ul>
035 *
036 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
037 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/HtmlSupport">HTML Basics</a>
038
039 * </ul>
040 */
041@SuppressWarnings({
042   "java:S110", // Inheritance depth acceptable for this class hierarchy
043   "java:S115", // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase naming convention
044})
045public class HtmlDocSerializerSession extends HtmlStrippedDocSerializerSession {
046
047   // Property name constants
048   private static final String PROP_ctx = "ctx";
049   private static final String PROP_varResolver = "varResolver";
050
051   /**
052    * Builder class.
053    */
054   @SuppressWarnings({
055      "java:S119" // 'SELF' (CRTP self-type) is intentional and clearer than a single-letter name.
056   })
057   public abstract static class Builder<SELF extends Builder<SELF>> extends HtmlStrippedDocSerializerSession.Builder<SELF> {
058
059      private HtmlDocSerializer ctx;
060      private String nonce;
061
062      /**
063       * Constructor
064       *
065       * @param ctx The context creating this session.
066       */
067      protected Builder(HtmlDocSerializer ctx) {
068         super(ctx);
069         this.ctx = ctx;
070      }
071
072      /**
073       * Sets the per-response Content-Security-Policy nonce stamped onto inline {@code <script>}/{@code <style>}
074       * tags emitted during this render.
075       *
076       * <p>
077       * This is a per-render (session-scoped) value — it intentionally does NOT participate in the serializer
078       * cache key, since a per-request nonce would otherwise force a cache miss on every request.
079       *
080       * @param value The nonce token. May be <jk>null</jk> to disable nonce stamping.
081       * @return This object.
082       */
083      public SELF nonce(String value) {
084         nonce = value;
085         return self();
086      }
087
088      @Override
089      public HtmlDocSerializerSession build() {
090         return new HtmlDocSerializerSession(this);
091      }
092
093   }
094
095   /**
096    * Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed {@code create()} path (CRTP terminal).
097    */
098   public static final class DefaultBuilder extends Builder<DefaultBuilder> {
099
100      DefaultBuilder(HtmlDocSerializer ctx) {
101         super(ctx);
102      }
103   }
104
105   private static final VarResolver DEFAULT_VR = VarResolver.create().defaultVars().vars(HtmlWidgetVar.class).build();
106
107   /**
108    * Creates a new builder for this object.
109    *
110    * @param ctx The context creating this session.
111    * @return A new builder.
112    */
113   @SuppressWarnings({
114      "java:S1452" // Builder<?> wildcard return intentional; callers use it to construct session instances polymorphically
115   })
116   public static Builder<?> create(HtmlDocSerializer ctx) {
117      return new DefaultBuilder(ctx);
118   }
119
120   private final HtmlDocSerializer ctx;
121   private final String nonce;
122
123   /**
124    * Constructor.
125    *
126    * @param builder The builder for this object.
127    */
128   protected HtmlDocSerializerSession(Builder<?> builder) {
129      super(builder);
130      ctx = builder.ctx;
131      nonce = builder.nonce;
132      addVarBean(HtmlWidgetMap.class, ctx.getWidgets());
133   }
134
135   /**
136    * The per-response Content-Security-Policy nonce for this render.
137    *
138    * <p>
139    * When non-<jk>null</jk>, inline {@code <script>}/{@code <style>} tags emitted by the HtmlDoc template are
140    * stamped with a matching {@code nonce="..."} attribute so they satisfy a nonce-based CSP.
141    *
142    * @see HtmlDocSerializerSession.Builder#nonce(String)
143    * @return The nonce token, or <jk>null</jk> if nonce stamping is disabled.
144    */
145   public final String getNonce() { return nonce; }
146
147   /**
148    * Returns the {@link HtmlDocSerializer.Builder#navlinks(String...)} setting value in this context.
149    *
150    * @return
151    *    The {@link HtmlDocSerializer.Builder#navlinks(String...)} setting value in this context.
152    *    <jk>null</jk> if not specified.
153    *    Never an empty map.
154    */
155   public final String[] getNavLinks() { return ctx.navlinks; }
156
157   /**
158    * Calls the parent {@link #doSerialize(SerializerPipe, Object)} method which invokes just the HTML serializer.
159    *
160    * @param out
161    *    Where to send the output from the serializer.
162    * @param o The object being serialized.
163    * @throws Exception Error occurred during serialization.
164    */
165   @SuppressWarnings({
166      "java:S112" // throws Exception intentional - callback/lifecycle method for parent serializer
167   })
168   public void parentSerialize(Object out, Object o) throws Exception {
169      try (var pipe = createPipe(out)) {
170         super.doSerialize(pipe, o);
171      }
172   }
173
174   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerSession */
175   protected VarResolverSession createDefaultVarResolverSession() {
176      return DEFAULT_VR.createSession();
177   }
178
179   @Override /* Overridden from Serializer */
180   protected void doSerialize(SerializerPipe out, Object o) throws IOException, SerializeException {
181
182      try (var w = getHtmlWriter(out)) {
183         try {
184            getTemplate().writeTo(this, w, o);
185         } catch (Exception e) {
186            throw new SerializeException(e);
187         }
188      }
189   }
190
191   /**
192    * Performs an action on all widgets defined in his session.
193    *
194    * @param action The action to perform.
195    * @see HtmlDocSerializer.Builder#widgets(Class...)
196    * @return This object.
197    */
198   protected final HtmlDocSerializerSession forEachWidget(Consumer<HtmlWidget> action) {
199      ctx.forEachWidget(action);
200      return this;
201   }
202
203   /**
204    * Aside section contents.
205    *
206    * @see HtmlDocSerializer.Builder#aside(String...)
207    * @return
208    *    The overridden contents of the aside section on the HTML page.
209    */
210   protected final String[] getAside() { return ctx.aside; }
211
212   /**
213    * Aside section contents float.
214    *
215    * @see HtmlDocSerializer.Builder#asideFloat(AsideFloat)
216    * @return
217    *    The location of where to place the aside section.
218    */
219   protected final AsideFloat getAsideFloat() { return ctx.asideFloat; }
220
221   /**
222    * Footer section contents.
223    *
224    * @see HtmlDocSerializer.Builder#footer(String...)
225    * @return
226    *    The overridden contents of the footer section on the HTML page.
227    */
228   protected final String[] getFooter() { return ctx.footer; }
229
230   /**
231    * Additional head section content.
232    *
233    * @see HtmlDocSerializer.Builder#head(String...)
234    * @return
235    *    HTML content to add to the head section of the HTML page.
236    */
237   protected final String[] getHead() { return ctx.head; }
238
239   /**
240    * Header section contents.
241    *
242    * @see HtmlDocSerializer.Builder#header(String...)
243    * @return
244    *    The overridden contents of the header section on the HTML page.
245    */
246   protected final String[] getHeader() { return ctx.header; }
247
248   /**
249    * Nav section contents.
250    *
251    * @see HtmlDocSerializer.Builder#nav(String...)
252    * @return
253    *    The overridden contents of the nav section on the HTML page.
254    */
255   protected final String[] getNav() { return ctx.nav; }
256
257   /**
258    * Page navigation links.
259    *
260    * @see HtmlDocSerializer.Builder#navlinks(String...)
261    * @return
262    *    Navigation links to add to the HTML page.
263    */
264   @SuppressWarnings({
265      "java:S1845" // Method name intentionally differs only by case from getNavLinks for backward compatibility
266   })
267   protected final String[] getNavlinks() { return ctx.navlinks; }
268
269   /**
270    * No-results message.
271    *
272    * @see HtmlDocSerializer.Builder#noResultsMessage(String)
273    * @return
274    *    The message used when serializing an empty array or empty list.
275    */
276   protected final String getNoResultsMessage() { return ctx.getNoResultsMessage(); }
277
278   /**
279    * Javascript code.
280    *
281    * @see HtmlDocSerializer.Builder#script(String...)
282    * @return
283    *    Arbitrary Javascript to add to the HTML page.
284    */
285   protected final String[] getScript() { return ctx.script; }
286
287   /**
288    * CSS style code.
289    *
290    * @see HtmlDocSerializer.Builder#style(String...)
291    * @return
292    *    The CSS instructions to add to the HTML page.
293    */
294   protected final String[] getStyle() { return ctx.style; }
295
296   /**
297    * Stylesheet import URLs.
298    *
299    * @see HtmlDocSerializer.Builder#stylesheet(String...)
300    * @return
301    *    The link to the stylesheet of the HTML page.
302    */
303   protected final String[] getStylesheet() { return ctx.stylesheet; }
304
305   /**
306    * HTML document template.
307    *
308    * @see HtmlDocSerializer.Builder#template(Class)
309    * @return
310    *    The template to use for serializing the page.
311    */
312   protected final HtmlDocTemplate getTemplate() { return ctx.getTemplate(); }
313
314   /**
315    * Prevent word wrap on page.
316    *
317    * @see HtmlDocSerializer.Builder#nowrap()
318    * @return
319    *    <jk>true</jk> if <js>"* {white-space:nowrap}"</js> should be added to the CSS instructions on the page to prevent word wrapping.
320    */
321   protected final boolean isNowrap() { return ctx.nowrap; }
322
323   /**
324    * Resolve $ variables in serialized POJO.
325    *
326    * @see HtmlDocSerializer.Builder#resolveBodyVars()
327    * @return
328    *    <jk>true</jk> if $ variables in serialized POJO should be resolved.
329    */
330   protected final boolean isResolveBodyVars() { return ctx.resolveBodyVars; }
331
332   @Override /* Overridden from HtmlStrippedDocSerializerSession */
333   protected FluentMap<String,Object> properties() {
334      return super.properties()
335         .a(PROP_ctx, ctx)
336         .a(PROP_varResolver, getVarResolver());
337   }
338}
